warnings.message: A surcharge applies for drivers under 25.

post.description: Authenticate user and get JWT tokens.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently logged-in user.
Retrieves the full itinerary of a given booking.

put.description: Changes dates, groups, or extras for a booking (triggers internal requote).

post.description: Cancels a reservation and releases inventory.

get.description: Returns a list of all active stores.

delete.description: Soft deletes a store. Fails if active bookings exist.

patch.description: Quick action to mark a vehicle as IN_MAINTENANCE, ACTIVE, or RETIRED.

post.description: Set a new base daily rate for a specific store and vehicle group.
Set a price adjustment (e.g., 1.5x) for specific dates, stores, or groups.

store_id.description: If null, applies to all stores

group_id.description: If null, applies to all groups
